message.content:
Implement the industrial care service page. Working directory: /Users/so/MyWorkSpace/personal/care-inomi/.worktrees/feature/initial-setup Create the services directory and industrial care page. 1. Create src/pages/services/index.astro (services list page): ```astro --- import BaseLayout from "../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro"; import Header from "../../components/common/Header.astro"; import Footer from "../../components/common/Footer.astro"; import Container from "../../components/ui/Container.astro"; import ServiceCards from "../../components/sections/ServiceCards.astro"; import CTASection from "../../components/sections/CTASection.astro"; ---

サービス一覧

仕事と介護の両立に関するあらゆるお悩みに対応します

``` 2. Create src/pages/services/industrial-care.astro: ```astro --- import ServiceLayout from "../../layouts/ServiceLayout.astro"; import Container from "../../components/ui/Container.astro"; import CTASection from "../../components/sections/CTASection.astro"; import FadeInSection from "../../components/ui/FadeInSection"; import CountUp from "../../components/ui/CountUp"; import { Briefcase, Users, TrendingUp, CheckCircle, ArrowRight } from "lucide-react"; --- {/* Service Overview */}

産業ケアマネとは

産業ケアマネージャーは、企業で働く従業員の介護に関する相談に対応し、 仕事と介護の両立を支援する専門家です。企業と従業員の間に立ち、 介護離職を防ぐためのサポートを行います。

{/* Service Features */}
{[ { icon: "users", title: "従業員向け相談窓口", description: "介護に関する不安や悩みを気軽に相談できる窓口を設置。専門家が親身に対応します。", }, { icon: "briefcase", title: "介護離職防止コンサルティング", description: "企業の人事制度や働き方改革を支援。介護と仕事を両立できる環境づくりをサポート。", }, { icon: "trending-up", title: "介護休業取得支援", description: "介護休業制度の活用方法をアドバイス。スムーズな休業取得と復帰をサポートします。", }, ].map((item, index) => (
{item.icon === "users" && } {item.icon === "briefcase" && } {item.icon === "trending-up" && }

{item.title}

{item.description}

 ))}
{/* Benefits Section */}

導入効果

{[ { number: 30, suffix: "%", label: "介護離職率の低下" }, { number: 85, suffix: "%", label: "従業員満足度" }, { number: 20, suffix: "%", label: "生産性向上" }, ].map((item, index) => (

{item.label}

 ))}
{/* Flow Section */}

導入までの流れ

{[ { step: 1, title: "お問い合わせ", description: "LINEまたはお電話でお気軽にご連絡ください。" }, { step: 2, title: "ヒアリング", description: "貴社の課題や状況を詳しくお聞きします。" }, { step: 3, title: "プラン提案", description: "最適なサポートプランをご提案します。" }, { step: 4, title: "導入開始", description: "サービスを開始し、継続的にサポートします。" }, ].map((item, index) => (
{item.step}

{item.title}

{item.description}

 ))}
``` Use mkdir -p for directories if needed, and Write tool for files.

1→---
     2→import "../styles/global.css";
     3→
     4→interface Props {
     5→  title: string;
     6→  description: string;
     7→  ogImage?: string;
     8→  noIndex?: boolean;
     9→}
    10→
    11→const { title, description, ogImage, noIndex = false } = Astro.props;
    12→const canonicalUrl = new URL(Astro.url.pathname, Astro.site);
    13→const ogImageUrl = ogImage ? new URL(ogImage, Astro.site).href : undefined;
    14→---
    15→
    16→<!doctype html>
    17→<html lang="ja">
    18→  <head>
    19→    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    20→    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    21→    <link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="/favicon.svg" />
    22→
    23→    <!-- SEO Meta Tags -->
    24→    <title>{title}</title>
    25→    <meta name="description" content={description} />
    26→    <link rel="canonical" href={canonicalUrl} />
    27→    {noIndex && <meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow" />}
    28→
    29→    <!-- Open Graph -->
    30→    <meta property="og:type" content="website" />
    31→    <meta property="og:url" content={canonicalUrl} />
    32→    <meta property="og:title" content={title} />
    33→    <meta property="og:description" content={description} />
    34→    {ogImageUrl && <meta property="og:image" content={ogImageUrl} />}
    35→    <meta property="og:locale" content="ja_JP" />
    36→    <meta property="og:site_name" content="合同会社あいのみ" />
    37→
    38→    <!-- Twitter Card -->
    39→    <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image" />
    40→    <meta name="twitter:title" content={title} />
    41→    <meta name="twitter:description" content={description} />
    42→    {ogImageUrl && <meta name="twitter:image" content={ogImageUrl} />}
    43→  </head>
    44→  <body class="min-h-screen flex flex-col bg-white text-neutral-800">
    45→    <!-- Header will be added later -->
    46→
    47→    <main class="flex-1">
    48→      <slot />
    49→    </main>
    50→
    51→    <!-- Footer will be added later -->
    52→  </body>
    53→</html>
    54→

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

## 作成ファイル

1. **`/Users/so/MyWorkSpace/personal/care-inomi/.worktrees/feature/initial-setup/src/pages/services/index.astro`**

2. **`/Users/so/MyWorkSpace/personal/care-inomi/.worktrees/feature/initial-setup/src/pages/services/industrial-care.astro`**

   - 3つのサービス特徴（従業員向け相談窓口、介護離職防止コンサルティング、介護休業取得支援）

   - CTAセクション
